us_h1b.switch_conditions: New employer must file H-1B transfer petition before employment begins; portability applies after 180 days with an approved I-140
us_h1b.partner_work_notes: Partner eligible for H-4 EAD only after principal holder's I-140 is approved (typically 2–4 years after H-1B start)

uk_skilled_worker.switch_conditions: Can switch employers but new employer must be a licensed sponsor; notify Home Office
uk_skilled_worker.partner_work_notes: Dependant visa grants full work rights with no restrictions

uk_graduate.switch_conditions: No sponsorship required; may work for almost any employer in any job, be self-employed, or change jobs freely. Non-extendable; switch to a sponsored route (e.g. Skilled Worker) before it expires.
uk_graduate.partner_work_notes: Partner/children already in the UK as your dependants can stay and work; new dependants generally cannot be added on this route.

canada_express_entry.switch_conditions: No employer tie — open work permit once PR is granted
canada_express_entry.partner_work_notes: Partner receives open work permit alongside principal applicant

australia_tss_482.switch_conditions: Can switch to another approved sponsor; must notify Department of Home Affairs
australia_tss_482.partner_work_notes: Secondary applicant on the same visa gets full work rights

germany_fachkraeftezuwanderungsgesetz.switch_conditions: Can switch employers without re-applying for a new visa; notify immigration authority
germany_fachkraeftezuwanderungsgesetz.partner_work_notes: Family reunion visa grants partner full work authorization from day one

france_passeport_talent.switch_conditions: Can switch employers within the Passeport Talent category; update with prefecture
france_passeport_talent.partner_work_notes: Passeport Talent famille card gives partner full and unrestricted work rights
